full_text:
Yang Yi (Weigong) 楊儀 (威公)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Yi (楊儀), styledWeigong (威公), was born in Xiangyang. Opposed old enemy Wei Yan. Later later stripped of rank for dissentious words. Yang Yi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Yang Yi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
